questions.question_text: Dr. Al-Rashid made a 'breakthrough' discovery about Red Sea coral heat resistance. What does 'breakthrough' mean?

options.text: A minor improvement that has little effect on existing knowledge
A sudden failure that sets back years of scientific progress
A significant discovery that opens new possibilities in a field
A routine finding that confirms what was already well known

questions.explanation_ar: breakthrough تعني اختراق علمي أو اكتشاف مهم يفتح آفاقاً جديدة ويغير مسار البحث في مجال ما.

questions.question_text: Red Sea corals have 'adaptations' that help them survive high temperatures. What does 'adaptations' mean?

options.text: Weaknesses that make an organism sensitive to environmental changes
Features or changes that help an organism survive in its environment
Diseases that affect the colour and structure of coral over time
Laboratory experiments designed to test coral heat tolerance

questions.explanation_ar: adaptations تعني تكيّفات، أي خصائص أو تغييرات تساعد الكائن الحي على البقاء والنجاح في بيئته الخاصة.

questions.question_text: Red Sea corals can 'withstand' temperatures that would kill most other corals worldwide. What does 'withstand' mean?

options.text: To quickly absorb and store heat in protective tissue
To actively produce cooling chemicals in response to heat
To completely avoid environments where temperature changes occur
To resist and remain undamaged despite difficult or harsh conditions

questions.explanation_ar: withstand تعني يتحمل ويقاوم، أي القدرة على البقاء سليماً رغم مواجهة ظروف قاسية أو تهديدات شديدة.

questions.question_text: Scientists believe Red Sea corals have 'evolved' to become extremely heat resistant over time. What does 'evolved' mean?

options.text: Developed gradually through natural processes over a long period
Been artificially designed by scientists to resist specific threats
Remained completely unchanged since they first formed in the sea
Suddenly appeared with new characteristics in a very short time

questions.explanation_ar: evolved تعني تطوّر تدريجياً عبر عمليات طبيعية على مدى فترات زمنية طويلة جداً.

questions.question_text: The research has wide 'implications' for reef conservation worldwide. What does 'implications' mean?

options.text: Direct financial costs that a research project requires
Possible consequences or effects that follow from a finding
The specific tools and methods used during scientific research
Written reports that summarise the results of a study

questions.explanation_ar: implications تعني تداعيات أو نتائج محتملة، أي ما يترتب على اكتشاف ما أو يترتب عليه من عواقب ومعانٍ.

questions.question_text: When scientists 'contribute' to marine research, they actively add knowledge, effort, or resources to the field.
questions.explanation_ar: صحيح. contribute تعني يُساهم ويُشارك، أي تقديم إسهام حقيقي يضيف قيمة لمجال علمي أو مشروع ما.

questions.question_text: Scientists who 'monitor' reef health are conducting a one-time check and never returning to collect more data.
questions.explanation_ar: خطأ. monitor تعني يراقب ويتابع بصفة منتظمة، أي رصد مستمر وليس فحصاً لمرة واحدة فقط.

questions.question_text: The young researchers were completely _____ by the diversity of life they found on the Red Sea reef.
questions.explanation_ar: fascinated تعني مفتون ومولع بشيء ما، أي شعور بانجذاب شديد ومثير للاهتمام نحو شيء ما.

questions.question_text: Which sentence uses the present perfect continuous in the negative form correctly?

options.text: The water temperature hasn't been rising lately, which is a good sign.
The coral hasn't been grew back since the bleaching event.
Scientists haven't studying reef damage over the past month.
The team not have been monitoring the reef since January.

questions.explanation_ar: تكوين النفي في المضارع التام المستمر هو: haven't/hasn't + been + فعل-ing. الخيار a صحيح، بينما تخطئ البقية في صيغة الفعل أو ترتيب المساعد.

questions.question_text: Which sentence focuses on the RESULT of an action, not its ongoing duration?

options.text: Dr. Al-Rashid has been researching coral genetics for three years.
Scientists have been testing the coral samples all morning.
The research team has discovered a new heat-resistant coral species.
The water has been warming gradually since the decade began.

questions.explanation_ar: المضارع التام البسيط (has discovered) يُبرز النتيجة المكتملة، بينما المضارع التام المستمر (has been + -ing) يُبرز الاستمرارية والمدة.

questions.question_text: Complete: 'How long _____ the team _____ data about the reef?' (ongoing collection)

options.text: did / collect
has / collected
has / been collecting
is / been collecting

questions.explanation_ar: صيغة السؤال عن المدة في المضارع التام المستمر هي: How long + has/have + subject + been + فعل-ing? للتعبير عن نشاط مستمر حتى الآن.

questions.question_text: Which sentence correctly uses the present perfect continuous to explain a current visible result?

options.text: The reef looks damaged — scientists have been warning about this for years.
The reef looks damaged — scientists warned about this in a report last year.
The reef looks damaged — scientists are warning about this problem.
The reef looks damaged — scientists will have been warning about this.

questions.explanation_ar: يُستخدم المضارع التام المستمر لتفسير نتيجة حاضرة من خلال نشاط استمر من الماضي حتى الآن، كما في الخيار a.

questions.question_text: 'They have been working on this reef restoration project for three years and they are nearly done' is grammatically correct.
questions.explanation_ar: صحيح. have been working مع for three years يُعبّر عن نشاط مستمر بدأ قبل ثلاث سنوات ولا يزال جارياً حتى الآن.

questions.question_text: Match each sentence to the correct description of how the present perfect continuous is being used.

left_items: The divers are exhausted because they have been swimming for five hours.
Scientists have been collecting reef data since the project began.
It has been raining heavily — that is why the water is cloudy.
She has been diving in the Red Sea every weekend for two months.
right_items: describes a repeated action over time
shows duration from a starting point
gives a reason for a current state

correct_answer.left: The divers are exhausted because they have been swimming for five hours.
correct_answer.right: gives a reason for a current state

correct_answer.left: Scientists have been collecting reef data since the project began.
correct_answer.right: shows duration from a starting point

correct_answer.left: It has been raining heavily — that is why the water is cloudy.
She has been diving in the Red Sea every weekend for two months.
correct_answer.right: describes a repeated action over time

questions.explanation_ar: المضارع التام المستمر يُستخدم لأربعة أغراض: تفسير سبب الحالة الراهنة، الاستمرار من نقطة بداية محددة، نتيجة حاضرة، أو نشاط متكرر عبر الزمن.

questions.question_text: According to Passage B, what is the maximum water temperature at which Red Sea corals can survive?
questions.explanation_ar: ذكر النص أن شعاب البحر الأحمر يمكنها البقاء في درجات حرارة تصل إلى 32°C، في حين تبدأ معظم الشعاب في النفوق عند 29°C.

questions.question_text: According to Passage B, what did Dr. Al-Rashid's team develop to test water quality directly at the reef site?

options.text: A satellite tracking system to identify reef zones from space
A mobile laboratory that can process water samples on-site
A temperature control device that cools reef water during heatwaves
An artificial reef structure that replaces damaged coral sections

questions.explanation_ar: ذكر النص أن الفريق طوّر مختبراً متنقلاً يُمكنه معالجة عينات المياه في الموقع مباشرةً لتوفير نتائج فورية.

questions.question_text: What does Passage B imply when it says the Red Sea corals could 'help restore damaged reefs in other parts of the world'?

options.text: Red Sea corals are being physically transplanted to reefs in other countries right now
Understanding Red Sea coral genetics could guide global reef restoration efforts
All damaged reefs in the world can be repaired using coral from the Red Sea
Scientists plan to replace ocean water in other regions with Red Sea water

questions.explanation_ar: يُضمّن النص أن دراسة كيفية تكيّف شعاب البحر الأحمر مع الحرارة يمكن أن تُرشد العلماء إلى أساليب جديدة لحماية الشعاب الضعيفة حول العالم.

questions.question_text: According to Passage B, Dr. Ahmed Hassan is the director of the Marine Research Institute in Jeddah.
questions.explanation_ar: صحيح. ذكر النص أن الدكتور أحمد حسن هو مدير معهد الأبحاث البحرية في جدة، ونقل اقتباساً مباشراً له.

questions.question_text: According to Passage B, over _____ percent of the world's coral reefs are currently under threat.
questions.explanation_ar: ذكر النص أن أكثر من 75% من شعاب مرجان العالم مهددة حالياً، مما يجعل أعمال الحفاظ عليها أمراً بالغ الأهمية.

questions.question_text: Match each person or organization from Passage B to their correct role or action.

right_items: event where reef research findings were presented internationally
marine biologist leading coral reef research in the Red Sea
director of the Marine Research Institute in Jeddah
reef system with unique heat-resistant coral adaptations

correct_answer.right: marine biologist leading coral reef research in the Red Sea
director of the Marine Research Institute in Jeddah
event where reef research findings were presented internationally
reef system with unique heat-resistant coral adaptations

questions.explanation_ar: وردت هذه الجهات والأشخاص بوضوح في النص: الراشد (الباحثة الرئيسية)، حسن (مدير المعهد)، مؤتمر الأمم المتحدة (مكان العرض)، والبحر الأحمر (بيئة الشعاب المتميزة).
